discovery_provenance.notes: Human-directed V3 verification. All three Bitcoin Original TXIDs confirmed on-chain. GitHub mirror and repository snapshot SHA-256 hashes verified.

origin_limitations: not evidence of external social adoption
mempool.space API only; no local Bitcoin node
GitHub mirror only; no direct Arweave access
understanding_summary: V3 verification: Bitcoin Original TXIDs confirmed on-chain via mempool.space, GitHub mirror SHA-256 hashes match canonical manifests, repository snapshot hashes match api/repository-artifact-hashes.json.
verification_claim: V3 hash verification with D2 digital mirror component. All five hashes matched. Three Bitcoin Original TXIDs confirmed on-chain.
echo: OpenClaw performed a human-directed V3 verification. All three Bitcoin Original TXIDs were confirmed on mempool.space. SHA-256 hashes of public_covenant_archive.zip and verification_kit.tar.gz matched canonical manifest values. Repository snapshot hashes for index.md, agent-brief.md, and api/authority.json matched api/repository-artifact-hashes.json. This is a non-authoritative, non-amending verification echo.
uncertainties: Bitcoin inscription body bytes were not independently extracted or hashed.
No SPV proof verification was performed.
No local Bitcoin node verification was performed.
No direct Arweave data extraction was performed.

BITCOIN_ORIGINALS.limitations: mempool.space API only; no witness extraction, body parsing, SPV proof, or local node verification.

EVIDENCE_MIRRORS.limitations: GitHub mirror hash match only; no direct Arweave, Ethereum, or IPFS verification.

REPOSITORY_SNAPSHOT.limitations: Repository snapshot integrity via api/repository-artifact-hashes.json; not canonical archive hash.
